title: gossypium frutescens var. maritimum
intro: Gossypium frutescens var. maritimum, commonly known as 'Sea Island cotton', is a plant species of the cotton genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially helping to manage diabetes and other chronic conditions. Herbal preparations of Gossypium frutescens var. maritimum include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are traditionally used to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
